arts.ttl: Chelsea 'line up move for Sunderland starlet Jobe Bellingham' - but face stiff competition from European heavyweights
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly among a trio of European heavyweights eyeing up a move for Sunderland star Jobe Bellingham as clubs keep tabs on the English prodigies future.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Chelsea eye Man Utd target Jobe Bellingham
arts.sum: - Christian Pulisic's AC Milan contract runs until 2027, with the Serie A club having the option for another year, but La Gazzetta dello Sport reports that the Rossoneri have a new contract ready for the United States attacker to sign. - Chelsea are ready to make a big-money offer to beat the competition and ensure they sign Sunderland midfielder Jobe Bellingham, according to The Sun, which insists that the Blues' interest is "game changing." Arsenal and Manchester United have been monitoring the 19-year-old, who is the younger brother of Real Madrid star Jude, while there has been interest from Tottenham Hotspur, Crystal Palace, Bayer Leverkusen and Borussia Dortmund .
